name: c/d multicare wet dog food
description: bladder stones are collections of mineral crystals that combine together in the urinary tract. they can cause discomfort and lead to more serious problems that require the care of a veterinarian. hill's nutritionists & veterinarians developed prescription diet c/d multicare clinical nutrition specially formulated to support a dog's urinary health and reduce the risk of struvite and calcium oxalate stones. this wet food is made with chicken and has an irresistible taste that your dog will love.
